title: Scaled Ender Dragon
description: Enhances the Ender Dragon fight by scaling the difficulty and mechanics based on Players!
body:
ScaledEnderDragon is a powerful Minecraft plugin that enhances the Ender Dragon fight by introducing dynamic scaling based on player count and unique combat mechanics.
 
# Features
## Dynamic Scaling System
- Automatic difficulty adjustment based on player count (2-10 players)
- Use dragon eggs to manually scale your dragon without the need of players.
- For example: with two players in the end, and 3 dragon eggs placed on the center pillar of the portal; the dragon will then be a 5 scale dragon!
- Progressive scaling of:
- Dragon health
- Damage output
- Damage resistance
- Crystal healing rate

## Advanced Combat Mechanics
- Lightning Strikes System
- Warning indicators
- Pattern-based strikes
- Visual and sound effects
- Enhanced Dragon Breath
- Scaling damage and radius
- Duration modifications
- Ghast Fireball Attacks
- Multiple projectile patterns
- Configurable damage values
- No terrain damage option

## Tiered Dragon System
- Multiple dragon tiers from "Lone Dragon" to "APOCALYPTIC DRAGON"
- Unique abilities per tier
- Custom visual effects and names
- Distinctive glow colors

## Reward System
- Damage-based leaderboard
- Tiered loot system (Common/Rare)
- Special rewards for top damage dealers
- Configurable drop rates and items
- NEW: Custom Items Support - Full integration with ItemsAdder, Oraxen, and Nexo
- NEW: Custom Enchantments - Support for both vanilla and custom enchantments in rewards

## In-Game Reward Management
Add custom rewards directly in-game using the new command:
/sed addreward [hand/item] [quantity] [rarity] [chance]
hand - Use the item you're currently holding (preserves all metadata, enchants, name, lore)
item - Specify a Minecraft or custom item by name (e.g., DIAMOND_SWORD or itemsadder:ruby_sword)
quantity - Set the number of items to reward (default: 1)
rarity - Choose between "common" and "rare" loot tables
chance - Set drop chance (1-100%) from the reward pool chance


## Requirements
- Java 17 or higher
- Paper/Spigot server version 1.21.4 or higher

## Commands
`/sed reload` | Reloads the plugin configuration |
`/sed kill` | Kills the current dragon alive, if player's have damaged it they will still be able to get rewards if they've done the min. damage.

## Permissions
- `scaledenderdragon.admin`
- Default: OP
- Grants access to administrative commands

For questions, support, or feedback join my discord here: https://discord.gg/wXJERKw6yJ
